---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Theses | Deon Roos"
page-layout: full
---

## Undergraduate Theses

<link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script>
  AOS.init({ once: true, duration: 600 });
</script>

::: thesis-grid
<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/DeonRoos_2015.pdf" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="0">

::: thesis-name
Deon [Roos]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2015
:::

::: thesis-title
Water vole ecosystem engineering
:::

</a>

<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/ShananDavies_2024.pdf" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">

::: thesis-name
Shanan [Davies]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2024
:::

::: thesis-title
Roe deer occupancy and habitat preferences
:::

</a>

<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/AliceSemple_2024.pdf" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">

::: thesis-name
Alice [Semple]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2024
:::

::: thesis-title
Predicting vole population growth and cycles
:::

</a>

<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/JoeDavidson_2025.pdf" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">

::: thesis-name
Joe [Davidson]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2025
:::

::: thesis-title
Post-release pheasant distribution
:::

</a>

<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/GraceSommerville_2025.pdf" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="400">

::: thesis-name
Grace [Sommerville]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2025
:::

::: thesis-title
Media coverage of illegal lynx reintroduction
:::

</a>

<a class="thesis-card" href="./theses/ZitongLui_2025.docx" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="500">

::: thesis-name
Zitong [Lui]{.surname}
:::

::: thesis-year
2025
:::

::: thesis-title
Roe deer and road collision risk
:::

</a>
:::
